3216860.name: 鯤島行者 Echoes of Formosa: Agent Reborn
3216860.description: In the heart of Taiwan, an island steeped in history and mystery, lies the ancient fortress of Stad Tayouan, also known as Stad Zeelandia. Step into the shoes of Li Bin, a covert operative whose fate is entwined with the secrets of Stad Tayouan. Waking up in the depths of Zeelandia's dungeon with no memory of how he got there, Li Bin must navigate the perilous streets of 1660, just before the outbreak of the infamous Siege of Fort Zeelandia War in 1661. As players delve into the game's four gripping chapters, they will uncover the hidden truths of Tainan's past, piecing together clues from archaeological discoveries and historical accounts. The meticulously crafted streetscapes draw inspiration from "La ville et le cháteau de Zélandia dans l'ile de Tayovan," transporting players to a meticulously recreated world where every corner whispers echoes of a bygone era. With stunning visuals and a rich narrative, this game invites players to immerse themselves in the history of Stad Tayouan, exploring its secrets and unraveling the mysteries that lie within. Are you ready to embark on this unforgettable journey through time? Prepare to discover the Echoes of Formosa: Agent Reborn and uncover the lost memories that linger within.
developers: Tainan Municipal Administration of Culture Heritage Moonshine Creation CO., LTD.
publishers: Tainan Municipal Administration of Culture Heritage
